title: Minecolonies Curios Compat
description: Adds Curios compatibility to the Minecolonies Builder's Goggles
body:
![Builder's Goggles in Curio head slot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88de4675cabe87b1bad33581761e12475eac2053.png)

Adds Curios compatibility to the Minecolonies Builder's Goggles so you can see build outlines while it is in your curios slot.

Obviously requires Curios and Minecolonies.
